title: sophora tetraptera var. microphylla
intro: Sophora tetraptera var. microphylla, also known as the Small-leaf Sophora, is a variety of the Sophora tetraptera plant, a flowering legume native to China. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Sophora tetraptera var. microphylla include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Sophora tetraptera var. microphylla can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, although its safety and efficacy should be evaluated by a healthcare professional before use.
